name: Praline Creme Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pastry for unbaked one-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Heat oven to 425 degrees F.
3. In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients; beat until well blended. Pour into pastry-lined pan.
4. Bake at 425 degrees for 15 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine brown sugar and flour. Using a pastry blender or fork, cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in pecans.
6. Sprinkle pecan mixture over pumpkin filling. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees; bake an additional 30 to 35 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Cool completely.
7. In a small bowl, combine cream cheese, milk and orange peel; mix until smooth. Gently fold whipped topping into cream cheese mixture.
8. Spoon over cooled pie. Refrigerate until serving time. Store in refrigerator.
